summary: The autonomous prompt is coherent with the authoritative run sheet: one ignored feat/aws-ecs-program worktree rooted at immutable PROGRAM_BASE_SHA, serialized mutations, truthful program-branch slice anchors, and unrelated concurrent documentation ignored through Stages 1-8. Stage 9 reviews and merges release/0.7.1, records RECONCILED_RELEASE_SHA, completes its affected-area checkpoint, then freezes one Plan 12 candidate. Cleanup precedes any post-mutation rereconciliation, and Task 9 performs one final fast-forward from the unchanged reconciliation anchor before GO.

review_basis.head: a579626e46c97973bc50b5dc9235032ad98199d9
review_basis.process: Independent orchestration-contract, mechanical, and Wardline reviews of the uncommitted planning repair in the isolated program worktree. Review covered immutable program ancestry, concurrent documentation classification, Stage 9 conflict resume, Plan 10 replacement lineage, Plan 12 cleanup ordering, candidate-bound Major Checkpoint 6, shell fences, links, stale terms, and source hashes.

warnings.detail: Later stages still require named operator authority, Docker, GitHub CI, AWS infrastructure and credentials, protected evidence storage, and cleanup capacity. Missing authority or facilities remain explicit blockers.

Approval authorizes orchestration, not AWS runtime or artifact publication. Only Plan 12 may issue runtime GO for the exact tested source SHA, digest, and platform after cleanup and the final fast-forward.

resolved_findings.resolution: The prompt now requires one program worktree and branch, removes per-slice integration branches, and serializes shared-worktree mutations.
The complete unfiltered suite is held until final washup and explicitly includes uv run pytest tests/ -v -m "" on one unchanged candidate.
Skills and subagents are discretionary, coordinator effort is xhigh, agents default high with xhigh escalation, and unsupported effort controls do not block execution.
Plan 06 now starts from the current program tip containing Plans 02 and 08A; no per-slice rebase instruction remains.

PROGRAM_BASE_SHA is now the immutable Stages 1-8 ancestry marker; unrelated documentation is ignored until Stage 9, which merges and records RECONCILED_RELEASE_SHA. Post-mutation release movement routes through Task 8 cleanup before rereconciliation, and Major Checkpoint 6 runs only after Task 1 freezes the candidate.

verification: all four amended orchestration documents have balanced Markdown fences
all 75 Bash or shell fences in those documents pass bash -n
all 24 local links in those documents resolve
a synthetic divergent-release repository passed the documented conflict-class exit and fresh-shell reconciliation-resume protocol
targeted searches found no RELEASE_START_SHA or paused-release instruction in the amended documents
independent orchestration-contract and Wardline reviewers returned APPROVED after repair
